# MetaKeys.IsValidBaggage method

Returns `true` when *value* conforms to the W3C Baggage grammar: each comma-separated list member is `token "=" *baggage-octet` with optional semicolon-separated properties. (R-4.2-m, AC-05.15)

```csharp
public static bool IsValidBaggage(string value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate `baggage` value. |

## Return Value

`true` when the value is well-formed baggage.
